name: Sweet Vildalia Onion Scallop
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking dish; set aside.
3. In a heavy skillet, melt 1/4 cup margarine over medium heat and cook the onions and green peppers until tender. Stir in pimento.
4. Place half of the onion mixture in prepared dish. Sprinkle with half of the grated cheese and half of the cracker crumbs.
5. Repeat layers of onion and cheese.
6. Beat eggs with light cream, salt, and pepper. Pour over onions.
7. Sprinkle top with cracker crumbs; lightly drizzle melted margarine over the top.
8. Bake for 25 minutes.
